title: Gold is in free fall. I've been short every single day this week. +$269 today. RR 4.38.
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
XAU/USD down 2% today alone.

Not a surprise if you were watching the structure.

What the 15M showed this morning : — EMA 200 sloping hard downward — no fight from buyers — Price rejecting the supply zone cleanly on open — No consolidation, no indecision — straight continuation — Tight stop, massive room below

Setup : Stop : 0.175% / $8,205 risk Target : 0.762% / $35,755 RR : 4.38

Result : +$269

Gold has dropped nearly 300 points in two weeks.

Every single day the structure said the same thing. Every single day I listened.

At what point do you start looking for a reversal on a move like this?

comments.author: cheezweiner
comments.body: How much is Gold down over a not-short window? Like 6 months or a year what is the return on Gold.

comments.author: No-Acanthaceae-5979
comments.body: I saw a youtube video where some gold dealer said he will not buy gold, but only sells it because theres so much gold in stock. That's crazy if gold free falls like this, they end up holding over priced stock xD
